title: AN ACT AMENDING CERTAIN ITEMS IN REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED FOURTEEN HUNDRED ELEVEN.

chunks.text:
H. No. 3516 / 57 OG No. 9, 1557 (February 27, 1961)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2832, June 19, 1960 ]

AN ACT AMENDING CERTAIN ITEMS IN REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED FOURTEEN HUNDRED ELEVEN.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Item (

ad

), page 76, group I, subparagraph (25), for the Province of Laguna, paragraph f Section two of Republic Act Numbered Fourteen hundred eleven is amended to read as follows:

"(

ad

) Municipal Hall, Alaminos&MDASHConstruction ........... P1,000.00"

SEC. 2. Item 3, for the Province of Laguna, page 202, paragraph

g

, Section two of the same Act is amended to read as follows:

"3. Municipal Hall, Alaminos&MDASHConstruction ........... P2,000.00"

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 19, 1960.
